benchmark_context.notes: Results collected on a Samsung Galaxy S24 Ultra (SM-S928B) running Samsung One UI. No clean-room isolation: background Samsung and Google services were active, no reboot before each run, One UI thermal management engaged. Numbers represent realistic consumer-device performance — conservative vs clean-room.

model_summaries.registry_notes: Common baseline. Fast, but finance reasoning may be weaker than Qwen2.5.
Smaller model for mid-range devices. Expect quality drop vs 1.5B.
Exceeds 1.5GB disk hard constraint (HC-1). Benchmark for quality reference only — not a production candidate.
Best quality/size balance for S24 Ultra class devices. Good baseline for finance prompts.
If the URL changes upstream, update this registry entry. License acceptance may be required.
Larger Llama 3.2 variant. Exceeds disk hard constraint (HC-1). Benchmark on S24 Ultra only for quality reference.
Likely exceeds 800MB RAM hard constraint. Benchmark to confirm. May fail HC-2.
